subject: Order Appointing the Hon. Nancy L. Backhouse, to be deputy judge of the Supreme Court of the Northwest Territories
precis: Order appointing the Honourable Nancy L. Backhouse, former judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Supreme Court of the Northwest Territories.
